signature_wines.name: Krug Grande Cuvee
signature_wines.style: traditional-method sparkling Champagne, multi-vintage prestige blend
signature_wines.tasting_notes: Expressive toast and brioche over stone fruit, verbena and vanilla pastry cream, the palate unctuous and creamy with a crisp lemon finish. Source: thefinestbubble.com Krug Grande Cuvee 173rd Edition.
signature_wines.description: Krug's multi-vintage flagship, a blend of more than 120 wines across ten-plus years built for breadth and length.

signature_wines.name: Dom Perignon
signature_wines.style: traditional-method sparkling Champagne, single-vintage prestige cuvee
signature_wines.tasting_notes: Silky and sculpted: white peach and candied citrus over a smoky, saline mineral core. Source: Decanter 95 points, 2013 vintage.
signature_wines.description: Moet's single-vintage prestige cuvee, a Chardonnay-Pinot blend released only in declared years.

signature_wines.name: Louis Roederer Cristal
signature_wines.style: traditional-method sparkling Champagne, single-vintage prestige cuvee
signature_wines.tasting_notes: Candied lemon and pollen over roasted hazelnut and vanilla, with incredible tension and chalky precision. Source: Decanter 97 points, 2013 vintage.
signature_wines.description: The first prestige cuvee, created for Tsar Alexander II in 1876, now from estate, largely biodynamic fruit.

signature_wines.name: Bollinger La Grande Annee
signature_wines.style: traditional-method sparkling Champagne, barrel-fermented vintage cuvee
signature_wines.tasting_notes: Marine sea-breeze and oyster-shell nose with gunpowder smoke and hazelnut, orchard fruit and fine vanilla. Source: Vinous 95 points, 2014 vintage.
signature_wines.description: Bollinger's fully barrel-fermented vintage prestige cuvee, named for the great years that produce it.

signature_wines.name: Pol Roger Cuvee Sir Winston Churchill
signature_wines.style: traditional-method sparkling Champagne, Pinot-led prestige cuvee
signature_wines.tasting_notes: Orange oil and confit lemon over brioche and honey, bright saline cutting apricot, mint and sage. Source: Vinous 96 points, 2013 vintage.
signature_wines.description: Pol Roger's Pinot-dominant prestige cuvee, created to reflect the style Churchill favoured.

signature_wines.name: Taittinger Comtes de Champagne Blanc de Blancs
signature_wines.style: traditional-method sparkling Champagne, Grand Cru Blanc de Blancs
signature_wines.tasting_notes: Citrus and white flowers over chalk, with creamy texture and saline length. Source: Vinous 96 points, 2012 vintage.
signature_wines.description: Taittinger's Grand Cru-only vintage Blanc de Blancs, a benchmark of the style.

signature_wines.name: Salon Cuvee S Le Mesnil Blanc de Blancs
signature_wines.style: traditional-method sparkling Champagne, single-village Grand Cru Blanc de Blancs
signature_wines.tasting_notes: Citrus and white flowers over iodine and chalk, with crystalline racy intensity and extraordinary length. Source: Vinous 96 points, 2008 vintage.
signature_wines.description: Salon's single wine, a Le Mesnil Blanc de Blancs made only in declared years.

signature_wines.name: Billecart-Salmon Brut Rose
signature_wines.tasting_notes: Pale salmon-pink with wild strawberry, redcurrant and white peach over saline freshness and silky texture. Source: Vinous 92 points.
signature_wines.description: One of the most acclaimed non-vintage roses in Champagne, made by cold, slow fermentation.

signature_wines.name: Dom Ruinart Blanc de Blancs
signature_wines.style: traditional-method sparkling Champagne, Grand Cru Blanc de Blancs prestige cuvee
signature_wines.tasting_notes: Chestnut, coconut and fresh bread over a firm, muscular, reductive structure with chalk and long flavour. Source: Vinous 95 points, 2009 vintage.
signature_wines.description: Ruinart's Grand Cru-only pure-Chardonnay prestige cuvee, aged long in deep chalk crayeres.

signature_wines.name: Selosse Substance
signature_wines.style: traditional-method sparkling Champagne, solera-based Grand Cru Blanc de Blancs
signature_wines.tasting_notes: Dried apricot, walnut and curry spice over honey and smoke, with oxidative depth, vinous power and saline length. Source: Vinous 95 points.
signature_wines.description: Selosse's solera-based Avize Blanc de Blancs, deeply oxidative and vinous, a benchmark grower Champagne.

signature_wines.name: Pierre Peters Cuvee Speciale Les Chetillons
signature_wines.style: traditional-method sparkling Champagne, single-vineyard Grand Cru Blanc de Blancs
signature_wines.tasting_notes: Spring flowers, white fruit and citrus over marzipan, with slate and crushed-rock energy and saline length. Source: Vinous 95 points, 2013 vintage.
signature_wines.description: Pierre Peters' single-vineyard old-vine Le Mesnil Blanc de Blancs, a benchmark grower Chardonnay.

signature_wines.name: Veuve Clicquot La Grande Dame
signature_wines.style: traditional-method sparkling Champagne, Pinot-led prestige cuvee
signature_wines.tasting_notes: Dried fig, apricot and ripe pear over hazelnut, richly balanced with yellow plum and tropical lift. Source: Vinous 95 points, 2015 vintage.
signature_wines.description: Veuve Clicquot's prestige cuvee, named for Madame Clicquot and drawn from historic Grand Cru plots.
